name: Leadsheet

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Leadsheet 0.4.0 — public beta

Turn Obsidian notes into performance-ready lead sheets.

Leadsheet renders ChordPro directly in Obsidian, with chord-over-lyric
alignment that works for CJK lyrics—without monospace tricks.

## Highlights

- Transpose each song while preserving sensible sharp and flat spellings.
- Switch between sounding pitch and the chord shapes used with a capo.
- Show guitar chord diagrams that follow transpose and capo mode.
- Build continuous set lists with previous/next navigation.
- Use duration-paced autoscroll and performance mode on stage.
- Convert pasted chords-over-lyrics and flag invalid chord tokens while editing.

## Install the beta

Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat), choose **Add beta
plugin**, and enter:

`https://github.com/chrisamber/obsidian-leadsheet`

The Community Plugins submission is underway. Please report beta feedback and
bugs through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/chrisamber/obsidian-leadsheet/issues).

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/chrisamber/obsidian-leadsheet/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
